title: Beyond LoRA: Can you beat the most popular fine-tuning technique?
summary: 本文探讨了LoRA微调技术的局限性，并介绍了超越LoRA的替代方法，包括其他参数高效微调技术及其在性能、效率和适用场景上的比较。
highlights: LoRA is the most popular fine-tuning technique, but it has limitations.
We explore alternatives that can beat LoRA in certain scenarios.
Parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods offer trade-offs between performance and efficiency.
